# Design RFC Template

**Title**: <short-title>

**Status**: Draft | Review | Accepted

## Context
- Problem statement and constraints.

## Proposal
- Architecture overview; sequence sketches; contracts impact.

## Alternatives
- Options considered with trade-offs.

## Risks and Mitigations

## Rollout Plan
- Phases, feature flags, observability, rollback.

## References
- Links to ADRs, issues, PRs.
